issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were receiving duplicate tasks across pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close out the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving weekly check-in tasks from the post-referral workflow even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters did not include these statuses as exit or suppression criteria. A tweak to the filters was applied to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any outstanding check-in tasks on deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was updated on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO rather than the newly assigned one. The affected deal showed Paul instead of Julie Yocum in outgoing agent emails. The issue was resolved by the product team.
issues.workaround: For any deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually resend the agent introduction email with the correct LO information.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-enrolling deals flipped back from Committed/Referred Active
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then back to Committed or Referred Active due to a fallen contract, and then back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that deal stage 'Offer Accepted' was missing from the workflow's re-enrollment criteria. Madelaine added it as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted a second time during the impact window to ensure TCs receive the correct closing tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into closing workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow or generating closing tasks. HubSpot support was contacted and identified the root cause, after which the issue was confirmed fixed. MRC deals typically have no loan officer assigned, which may have contributed to the enrollment failure.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between approximately 2026-02-04 and 2026-04-01 into the TC workflow and send closing info collection emails manually.
